name: Van Augur (Reprint)
effect_text: [Activate: Main] You may rest this Character: If your Leader has the "Blackbeard Pirates" type, give up to 1 of your opponent's Characters 3 cost during this turn.[On K.O.] Draw 1 card.DISCLAIMER: This card is a reprint of the pre-existing card in the OP09 set.
